arohana: S M¹ G³ M¹ P D² N² Ṡ
avarohana: Ṡ N² D² P M¹ G³ R² S
name: Sujana Jeevana
rawText:
Pallavi:

Line:M,G, GS S,M,G,    | {G M}, ,, ,, ,, MGM,  | P,D,P, PDN,D,      | P,,, ,, P,,{DN}DP ||
LR:su ja na jī  va     na           rā ma    suguṇa bhū  sha      na    rā ma

Line:M,G, GS S,M,G,    | {G M}, ,, ,, ,, MGM,  | P,D,P, DNŚ, ND     | P,,, ,, P,{ŚN} NDP||
LR:su ja na jī  va     na           rā ma        suguṇa bhū  sha      na    rā  ma

Line:M,G,GS S,M,G,     | PPMM ,, ,, PGM,     | P, D,DP PD{N,ṘŚ}ND   | M,P, ,, PŚN3 D{P,,D} ||
LR:su ja na jī  va     na        rā ma         sugu na bhū  sha     na    rā  ma (sujanajīvana)

Anupallavi: 

Line:* M  ,N,D DNṠ,ṠN   | S Ṡ, ,, ,, Ṡ, Ṡ, | ,,   ND, N, Ṡ, ,, Ṡ,   | ṠṘN, N, ,, NDD, || ,*
  LR:bhu ja ga bhū sha   ṇā    rccita           budha janā va        na

Line:* M,  N,D, DNṠ, ṠN  | ṘṘṠṠ,, ,, Ṡ, Ṡ, | ,,   Ṡ Ṁ, Ġ Ṡ, ,, ṠN  | DNṠ,ṘṠN,NDD, ||
  LR:bhu ja ga bhū sha   ṇā    rccita           budha ja nā  va        nā-

Line:Ṡ, Ṙ, Ṡ, ,, N,D,  | N, Ṡ, ṠDṠN N, ND   | P,D,DP PDN,D,      | M P, ,, ,, D,N DP,, ||
LR:tmaja van di ta     śri ta can  da na     daśa tu ran  ga      mā    ma vā-

Line:Ṡ, Ṙ, Ṡ, ,, N,D,  | DNṘṠ ṠDṠN N, ND    | P,D,DP PDN,ṘŚND    | M P, ,, ,, Ṡ,N³ DP,, ||
LR:tmaja van di ta     śri ta can  da na     daśa tu ran  ga      mā    ma va (sujanajīvana)


Charaṇam:

Line:,, * MG,M P , ,, D, | ṠNṘṠ ṠN NDDP M, | ,,   PND, {PMM,} MGRG | G M, ,, ,, ,, ,, ||
     LR:cā  ru nē tra    śrī  ka  ḷa    tra      śrī ra mya  gā      tra

Line:,, * PG,MP, DNṘṠ   | ṠN ND DP PNDP M, | ,,  PN,D {PMM,} ,, R,G, | MP,M G M, ,, ,, ,, ||
     LR:tā  ra ka nā    ma su ca ri    tra      daśara tha   pu       tra

infoS:
Remaining Charaṇam Lines (Follow music same as Anupallavi):
tārakādhi           pā nana             dharmapāla           ka
tāraya raghu        varanirmala         tyāgarāja           sannuta    (sujanajīvana)
